description: Install or configure the AI Lifecycle module and set up project config.
Scaffold a new AI/ML project — creates folder structure IDE config and uv project.
Gathers domain knowledge via web and internal sources to build expert understanding.
Produces Research Thesis and PRD with traceable requirements from domain research.
Performs exploratory data analysis and establishes a model-agnostic performance baseline.
Selects the modelling paradigm and designs the experiment stack and tracking setup.
Breaks down architecture into INF-* infrastructure and EXP-* experiment tasks.
Writes the pre-experiment contract locking parameters compute budget and success tiers.
Builds data pipelines training/fit pipelines eval harness and tracking integration.
Executes model runs against the TECHSPEC and logs all results to the tracking tool.
Evaluates experiment results against TECHSPEC tiers and recommends next steps.
Runs hyperparameter optimization after baseline is confirmed stable.
Audits and amends all upstream docs after an experiment cycle.
Surfaces validated parameters and dead ends from past experiments before new work.
Captures session learnings into the team knowledge base.
Adapts trained model for production deployment with V&V.
